mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE openid = #{openid} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(id, username, email, openid, display_name, avatar_url, bio, status, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{openid}, #{displayName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{status}, #{emailVerifiedAt}, #{lastLoginAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
